What We Can Help With

📝

Product Review Requests

Want us to review a specific product? Send us the product name, where to buy it, and why you think it's worth reviewing.

❓

General Questions

Questions about our reviews, methodology, or recommendations? We're here to help!

🤝

Advertising & Partnerships

For advertising inquiries, contact ads@petfoodlab.it.com. Note: Advertising does not influence our reviews.

🔧

Technical Issues

Found a bug on our site? Having trouble with affiliate links? Let us know!

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How do you fund your reviews?

We're reader-supported. When you buy through our affiliate links, we earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. This allows us to remain independent and continue providing honest reviews.

Q: Do you accept free products from manufacturers?

No. We purchase all products ourselves to maintain complete independence and avoid any bias in our reviews.

Q: How often do you update reviews?

We regularly update our reviews based on new product releases, formulation changes, and customer feedback. Check the "Updated" date on each review.

🐾 PetFoodLab

Independent pet food reviews and recommendations. We test and review pet food so you don't have to.
